summary: Homepage performance dropped further to 63 (LCP 6.45 s) and remains persistently below 85 with no structural fix applied; /about is still an empty placeholder with SEO at 83 (below threshold); /projects and both project detail pages regressed in performance but remain near or at the 83–84 range.

pages.visual_fingerprint: Full-page portfolio homepage with teal-accented hero ('App' heading, 'Send me a message' CTA), four content sections (pillars, case studies, skills, contact form), and a dark contact footer — all sections visible and correctly laid out on both desktop and mobile.

visual_findings: Page still contains only the placeholder text 'This is an about page' on a near-blank dark canvas — no real content, nav, or footer present on either desktop or mobile.
pages.visual_fingerprint: Nearly blank dark page with only the stub text 'This is an about page' in the upper-left corner and no other UI elements visible on desktop or mobile.

Fully styled projects index page with 'My Projects' heading, five project cards (Clinical Note Structurer, Screenshot → PrimeVue, Lease Diff Explainer, Paperwork → Calendar, Dependency Upgrade Planner) in a 2-column desktop grid with the fifth card left-aligned, and a dark contact footer visible on both desktop and mobile.

Clinical Note Structurer detail page with breadcrumb nav, 'Evals: 10/10 passing' badge, two-column visit note / structured result interactive demo, amber disclaimer banner, expandable JSON and HIPAA notes accordions, and a dark contact footer — correctly rendered on both desktop and mobile.

Screenshot → PrimeVue detail page with breadcrumb nav, 'Evals: 5/5 passing' badge, dashed-border image drop zone, three sample thumbnail cards (Login form, Analytics dashboard, Pricing page), a placeholder result panel, expandable accordions, and a dark contact footer — correctly rendered on both desktop and mobile.

top_fix: Fix the homepage LCP (currently 6.45 s, performance score 63, persistently below 85 across many consecutive audits with no structural fix applied): preload the hero image with `<link rel="preload" as="image">`, serve it in WebP/AVIF at mobile-appropriate dimensions, and defer render-blocking resources above the fold.
issue_title: Homepage performance 63 (LCP 6.45 s) — deepening persistent regression; /projects and project pages regressed; /about still empty placeholder
issue_body:
## Homepage performance continues to deteriorate — now at 63

The homepage (`/`) scored **63** on today's mobile Lighthouse audit (2026-07-22), down from 73 yesterday — a **−10 pt drop** that exceeds the jitter threshold. LCP remains at **6,451 ms** with no structural fix applied across multiple consecutive audits.

### Current metrics (mobile) — `/`
| Metric | Value | vs. Previous |
|---|---|---|
| Performance | 63 | −10 pts (meaningful regression) |
| LCP | 6,451 ms | −75 ms (within jitter, still critically slow) |
| CLS | 0.015 | stable |
| TBT | 167 ms | −15 ms (within jitter) |

### Suggested fix
Preload the LCP hero image with `<link rel="preload" as="image">`, serve it in WebP/AVIF sized for mobile viewports, and defer render-blocking stylesheets/scripts above the fold. This recommendation has been open across multiple consecutive audits without action.

---

## `/projects` and project detail pages regressed

All three pages that recovered last audit have dropped back below or near 85:
- `/projects`: 92 → **83** (LCP +564 ms)
- `/projects/note-structurer`: 91 → **83** (LCP +640 ms)
- `/projects/screenshot-to-primevue`: 92 → **84** (LCP +713 ms)

LCP increases of 500–700 ms across all three pages simultaneously suggest a shared cause (server cold start, CDN latency spike, or a new blocking resource introduced in a recent deploy). Investigate whether a new third-party script or unoptimized asset was added.

---

## Still open — `/about` placeholder

`/about` remains an empty placeholder (stub text "This is an about page" only — no nav, no footer, no real content). SEO score is **83**, below the 85 threshold. Unchanged across multiple consecutive audits.

### Suggested fix
Build out the About page with real content, navigation, and footer.
